name: doya
description: Doya: mobile control for local AI coding agents

scripts.dev-xyy2: DOYA_HOME=.doya-dev DOYA_CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:8081,http://127.0.0.1:8081 DOYA_LISTEN=127.0.0.1:6868 DOYA_RELAY_ENABLED=0 npm run dev:server
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:server-deps && concurrently --kill-others --names protocol,client,server --prefix-colors yellow,blue,cyan "npm run watch:protocol" "npm run watch:client" "npm run dev:server:raw"
scripts.build:client: npm run build:protocol && npm run build --workspace=@getdoya/client
scripts.build:server-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:relay && npm run build:client && npm run build:control
scripts.build:server: npm run build:server-deps && npm run build --workspace=@getdoya/server && npm run build --workspace=@getdoya/cli
scripts.build:app-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:client && npm run build --workspace=@getdoya/expo-two-way-audio
scripts.typecheck:server: npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/client && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/cli
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:app-deps && npm run build:server-deps && npm run build --workspace=@getdoya/server && cd packages/app && cross-env DOYA_WEB_PLATFORM=electron npx expo export --platform web && cd ../.. && npm run build --workspace=@getdoya/desktop --
scripts.version: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: npm run release:prepare && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/highlight && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/protocol && npm run build:client && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/client && npm run build:server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@getdoya/cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/highlight && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/relay && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/protocol && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/client && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/server && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/cli
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/highlight --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/relay --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/protocol --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/client --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/server --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@getdoya/cli --access public
scripts.release:publish: npm publish --workspace=@getdoya/highlight --access public && npm publish --workspace=@getdoya/relay --access public && npm publish --workspace=@getdoya/protocol --access public && npm publish --workspace=@getdoya/client --access public && npm publish --workspace=@getdoya/server --access public && npm publish --workspace=@getdoya/cli --access public
scripts.release:beta:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:patch && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:minor && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:major && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:next: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:next && npm run release:push
scripts.release:promote: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:promote && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:patch && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:minor && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:major && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
